name: Democrats.org
subject: I want to hear from you
body:
Let's get to work.
---
**Leave your feedback for the Democratic Party's new CEO, Jess O'Connell.

** **[LET JESS KNOW](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Feedback-for-Jess1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+LET+JESS+KNOW&utm_campaign=em_20170513_joc_nd&source=em_20170513_joc_nd")**
Hi. I'm Jess, the new CEO of the Democratic Party.

I'm excited to be joining Tom, the rest of the team at DNC HQ, and all of our amazing supporters like you to rebuild our party from the grassroots up -- because I've seen the power of grassroots movements in action.

I got my start in politics helping elect Democrats in Colorado, Illinois, and my home state of Arizona, where we turned Arizona's 1st congressional district from red to blue.

We did it because we got organized in our communities and went block by block, neighborhood by neighborhood, to get the word out about what we believed in and turn out our voters to the polls on Election Day.

At EMILY's List, where I've been helping elect Democratic women for the past four years, I saw how we can do that same kind of grassroots organizing on a national scale. That's how we elected the most diverse Congress in history, including quadrupling the number of Democratic women of color in the Senate.

If we organize in every zip code, we can elect Democrats from school board to Senate in every corner of this country. I know, as Tom does, that we can do it -- but it's going to take all of us working together to get our party back in fighting form.

**So first thing's first: I want to hear from you. Let me know your thoughts and how our party can be more effective in your community so we can elect Democrats at every level and every state:**

**[LET JESS KNOW](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Feedback-for-Jess1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+LET+JESS+KNOW&utm_campaign=em_20170513_joc_nd&source=em_20170513_joc_nd")**
Thanks so much for being a part of our party. Supporters like you are what powers our candidates to victory, and you've already shown such an unprecedented level of activism and enthusiasm over the past few months.

I'm ready to jump in -- let's get to it.

Jess

Jess O'Connell
Chief Executive Officer
Democratic National Committee

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052ce07/4067b0a/2f9f8facc/7e77b596/3064640020/VEsF/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170513_joc_nd&source=em_20170513_joc_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052ce07/4067b0a/2f9f8facc/7e77b597/3064640020/VEsC/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170513_joc_nd&source=em_20170513_joc_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052ce07/4067b0a/2f9f8facc/7e77b594/3064640020/VEsD/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170513_joc_nd&source=em_20170513_joc_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052ce07/4067b0a/2f9f8facc/7e77b595/3064640020/VEsA/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170513_joc_nd&source=em_20170513_joc_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

name: Luke Hilgemann
subject: Do you have a few minutes?
body:
---
| |
---
| | | | |
---
| | [](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=13625056d49086725566e59604c8b51bc896e0d77df0d5a9c7e34db3fe8a2536a5b2087f6266cf26ebbf700ed08aa7bc4a01677591d6c38b)

| | Hello Peter,
Thanks again for being a part of our community of 3.2 million volunteers. Even though you're taking action this year with such a large, unmatched grassroots network, we'd still like to pay attention to your personal preferences.
I noticed we were still missing some information about you in Americans for Prosperity's volunteer database. Do you have a few minutes to update some info for us? [](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=13625056d4908672c5dd2dd20619b3ff07d5ad400db20c26d764a2cb8d73dff08589c99bb7a64cbb10d3607495ef48658caa03b9ab629740)
By updating your information, we can send you emails and event information specifically tailored to you - [**click here**](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=13625056d49086724c825ee2f69db6f724d0c1b75f4c475902dabfdecdee62c83ba973e480ecb472e6fabf1357f2055a0738455f51860aa1 "click here") to update your information!

In Liberty,

Luke Hilgemann
CEO
Americans for Prosperity

name: Democrats.org
subject: 3 House seats, 2 months
body:

name: Debbie
subject: Oil + Offshore = Disaster
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail
body:
| |
---
| |
---
| Friends,

It's been seven years since the BP oil spill and the Gulf of Mexico still hasn't fully recovered.

Mangrove islands have disappeared, dolphin and oyster populations continue to struggle, and nearly 30 percent of the oil that was spilt was never accounted for.

**Despite the Republican led Congress never enacting tougher safety regulations on offshore drilling since, Trump is plowing ahead with his plan to open Florida 's coasts, our coasts, to offshore drilling.**

That's why Senator Bill Nelson, myself and others are pushing forward with a plan that would extend a ban on offshore drilling in the eastern Gulf of Mexico.

All it takes is one mistake, one oil spill to wreak havoc on local communities, our economy, the environment, and maritime life.

[_**We must turn back Trump 's push to allow drilling off our coasts. Tell Trump and the big oil lobbyists that here, in Florida, we value our shorelines.**_](http://fl.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113e9f/622b7b5b/2d7ddb3/307bcb92/1615276340/VEsH/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/stopoffshoredrilling/?code=DWS&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fcontribute%2Fpage%2Fdwse170511ja%3Frecurring%3Dtrue")

Fishing in Florida supports hundreds of thousands of jobs and generates billions in revenue. Last year more than 110 million tourists visited our beautiful state, supporting millions of jobs.

[_**Florida can 't afford a major oil spill and I'm not willing to risk it. Join me and stand up for Florida against dangerous offshore drilling.**_](http://fl.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113e9f/622b7b5b/2d7ddb3/307bcb92/1615276340/VEsE/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/stopoffshoredrilling/?code=DWS&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fcontribute%2Fpage%2Fdwse170511ja%3Frecurring%3Dtrue")

Thank you,

Debbie |
Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
[Click here](http://fl.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113e9f/622b7b5b/2d7ddb3/307bcb95/1615276340/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://www.debbiewassermanschultz.com/subscriptions/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") to unsubscribe
---

Despite the Republican led Congress never enacting tougher safety regulations on offshore drilling since, Trump is plowing ahead with his plan to open Florida 's coasts, our coasts, to offshore drilling. That's why Senator Bill Nelson, myself and others are pushing forward with a plan that would extend a ban on offshore drilling in the eastern Gulf of Mexico. All it takes is one mistake, one oil spill to wreak havoc on local communities, our economy, the environment, and maritime life.
